template.description: Starts a governed Linear fronting project from reviewed starter data. Verify backend operations, auth posture, and policy boundaries against the real integration before locking.
template.recommendedBrief: Create a governed ANIP fronting layer for Linear. Expose selected behavior-shaped capabilities instead of raw backend operations. Read operations must preserve actor-visible scope. Write-adjacent operations must prepare previews or require approval before downstream mutation.

documents.title: Linear governed fronting intent
documents.content:
# Linear Governed Fronting Intent

> Imported from starter template `linear-fronting-starter`. Treat this as draft guidance, not discovered truth.

Expose a governed Linear capability surface in front of native API or MCP-backed operations.

## Template-suggested capabilities
- linear.issue.search_context: Search bounded Linear issues, projects, and cycles without exposing raw workspace tools.
- linear.issue.prepare: Prepare a Linear issue preview with team, project, labels, and priority before creating anything.
- linear.comment.prepare: Prepare a Linear issue comment from review or incident context without posting it.
- linear.status_transition.request: Prepare a governed Linear issue status transition request and stop for approval.
- linear.cycle_move.request: Prepare a governed request to move a Linear issue into a cycle or project and stop for approval.

## Governance posture
- Raw Linear tools are not exposed directly to agents.
- Reads return bounded actor-visible context.
- Write-adjacent actions prepare previews or require explicit approval before execution.
- Missing required inputs trigger clarification instead of guessing.

documents.title: Linear integration evidence
documents.content:
# Linear Integration Evidence Template

> Imported from starter template `linear-fronting-starter`. Verify every operation against your chosen native API/MCP source before locking.

Native API connection: LINEAR_API_URL
MCP connection: LINEAR_MCP_ENDPOINT

## Template-suggested backend operations
- linear.api.issue_search_context: GET /linear/issue_search_context
- linear.api.issue_prepare: POST /linear/issue_prepare
- linear.api.comment_prepare: POST /linear/comment_prepare
- linear.api.status_transition_request: POST /linear/status_transition_request
- linear.api.cycle_move_request: POST /linear/cycle_move_request

## Secret posture
- Studio stores secret references only; project exports must not contain tokens.
- Teams can implement either native API or MCP backend seams behind the same governed ANIP contract.

documents.title: Linear developer evidence
documents.content:
# Linear Developer Evidence

Imported from starter template `linear-fronting-starter`. This is developer-owned evidence for Studio Autopilot and generated-service review.

This document turns starter operations into explicit ANIP runtime governance and input-contract evidence. Review it against the real integration before publishing.

## Capability Evidence Summary

| capability_id | service_id | operation_type | side_effect_level | inputs | backend_operation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | ---: | --- |
| linear.issue.search_context | linear-fronting | read | read | 4 | linear.api.issue_search_context |
| linear.issue.prepare | linear-fronting | write | write_adjacent | 6 | linear.api.issue_prepare |
| linear.comment.prepare | linear-fronting | write | write_adjacent | 4 | linear.api.comment_prepare |
| linear.status_transition.request | linear-governance | write | write_adjacent | 4 | linear.api.status_transition_request |
| linear.cycle_move.request | linear-governance | write | write_adjacent | 4 | linear.api.cycle_move_request |

## Reviewed Developer Evidence

documents.title: Linear governed fronting intent
documents.content:
# Linear Governed Fronting Intent

> Imported from starter template `linear-fronting-starter`. Treat this as draft guidance, not discovered truth.

Expose a governed Linear capability surface in front of native API or MCP-backed operations.

## Template-suggested capabilities
- linear.issue.search_context: Search bounded Linear issues, projects, and cycles without exposing raw workspace tools.
- linear.issue.prepare: Prepare a Linear issue preview with team, project, labels, and priority before creating anything.
- linear.comment.prepare: Prepare a Linear issue comment from review or incident context without posting it.
- linear.status_transition.request: Prepare a governed Linear issue status transition request and stop for approval.
- linear.cycle_move.request: Prepare a governed request to move a Linear issue into a cycle or project and stop for approval.

## Governance posture
- Raw Linear tools are not exposed directly to agents.
- Reads return bounded actor-visible context.
- Write-adjacent actions prepare previews or require explicit approval before execution.
- Missing required inputs trigger clarification instead of guessing.

# Linear Integration Evidence Template

> Imported from starter template `linear-fronting-starter`. Verify every operation against your chosen native API/MCP source before locking.

Native API connection: LINEAR_API_URL
MCP connection: LINEAR_MCP_ENDPOINT

## Template-suggested backend operations
- linear.api.issue_search_context: GET /linear/issue_search_context
- linear.api.issue_prepare: POST /linear/issue_prepare
- linear.api.comment_prepare: POST /linear/comment_prepare
- linear.api.status_transition_request: POST /linear/status_transition_request
- linear.api.cycle_move_request: POST /linear/cycle_move_request

## Secret posture
- Studio stores secret references only; project exports must not contain tokens.
- Teams can implement either native API or MCP backend seams behind the same governed ANIP contract.

# Linear Developer Evidence

This document turns starter operations into explicit ANIP runtime governance and input-contract evidence. Review it against the real integration before publishing.

## Capability Evidence Summary

| capability_id | service_id | operation_type | side_effect_level | inputs | backend_operation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | ---: | --- |
| linear.issue.search_context | linear-fronting | read | read | 4 | linear.api.issue_search_context |
| linear.issue.prepare | linear-fronting | write | write_adjacent | 6 | linear.api.issue_prepare |
| linear.comment.prepare | linear-fronting | write | write_adjacent | 4 | linear.api.comment_prepare |
| linear.status_transition.request | linear-governance | write | write_adjacent | 4 | linear.api.status_transition_request |
| linear.cycle_move.request | linear-governance | write | write_adjacent | 4 | linear.api.cycle_move_request |

## Reviewed Developer Evidence
